name: facets
description: Self-review PRs locally — multi-agent code review, fix application, and the TIB/TIP paper trail, without the cloud review bill.

plugins.name: facets
plugins.description: Self-review a PR before it ships — locally, in seconds, without paying for a cloud review service. Eleven user-invokable slash commands (pr-switch, pr-review-local, pr-review-gh, pr-fix, pr-create, tib-create, tip-create, tib-ship, convert-tib-to-linear, ts-conventions, setup) plus a shared pr-review-engine dispatcher. Reviews fan out a multi-agent panel against the diff (correctness, error-handling, performance, security, CI, deps, React/Next, AI-SDK, Web3, accessibility, runtime-validation, ...), post inline comments to GitHub when desired (never auto-approves), and apply mechanical fixes on demand. Tuned for TS/React/Vercel codebases.
